--- title: "Comparison Report: UT/EAC" author: "Ali Al-Timimi, PhD" format: html params: data_file: "C:/Users/drziy/OneDrive/Desktop/Ali/scientific_research_current/global-cancer-complexity/output/global_cancer/RData/comparison_data/comparison_data_ut_eac.rds" execute: eval: true --- ::: {.panel-tabset} ### UT/EAC Overview ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Probes > - **Cancer Category:** carcinomas > - **Chip hu35ksuba**: 386 filtered probes > - **Chip hu6800**: 81 filtered probes ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](../../resources/plots/probes/ut_eac_probe_counts.png){width=7in} ::: ::: #### Summary Assessment **Overall Complexity & Entropy Assessment** | Measure | All Filtered Probes | GO MF Terms | KEGG Pathways | HALLMARK Genes | |:---|:---|:---|:---|:---| | **Complexity** | strong gain (uncertain) | () | strong loss (uncertain) | strong gain (uncertain) | | **Shannon Entropy** | no clear change (well supported) | () | no clear change (uncertain) | no clear change (uncertain) | | **Spectral Entropy** | no clear change (well supported) | () | no clear change (uncertain) | no clear change (uncertain) | ::: {.callout-note} **Interpretation Guide** - **Gain** = Increased complexity from normal to tumor - **Loss** = Complexity reduction from normal to tumor - **Chaotic** = Increased entropy from normal to tumor - **Anti-Chaotic** = Entropy reduction from normal to tumor - **P-values** = All p-values unadjusted unless noted ::: ::: ### GO Biological Process Clusters ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Complexity Change

Gain Complexity Clusters

Cluster # Terms p-value Representative Terms
6 1 0.021 nervous system development
11 1 0.045 positive regulation of apoptotic process
* Combined p-values are computed using Fisher’s method (sumlog) across the GO terms in each cluster.

Loss Complexity Clusters

Cluster # Terms p-value Representative Terms
13 3 0.859 positive regulation of transcription, DNA-templated; positive regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II; positive regulation of transcription, DNA-templated
1 3 0.861 negative regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II; regulation of transcription, DNA-templated; regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II
* Combined p-values are computed using Fisher’s method (sumlog) across the GO terms in each cluster.
#### Spectral Entropy Change ⚠️ Table not available. ::: ### GO Molecular Function Terms ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Complexity Change **Significant GO Molecular Function Terms (Complexity)** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](../../resources/plots/go/ut_eac_go_complexity.png){width=7in} ::: :::

::: ### KEGG Pathway Analysis ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Complexity Change **Significant KEGG Pathways (Complexity)** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ⚠️ Plot not available. ``` ::: ::: No significant KEGG pathways found (complexity). #### Spectral Entropy Change **Significant KEGG Pathways (Spectral Entropy)** ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ⚠️ Plot not available. ``` ::: ::: No significant KEGG pathways found (spectral entropy). ::: ### HALLMARK Genes Analysis ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Complexity Change **Significant HALLMARK Genes (Complexity)**

#### Spectral Entropy Change **Significant HALLMARK Genes (Spectral Entropy)** No significant MSigDB gene sets found (spectral entropy). ::: ### Latent Geometry **Latent-space normal-versus-tumor summary** Latent-space metrics are computed from the VAE representation using samples derived from the **hu35ksuba** platform only. These quantities summarize within-class geometric structure and separation between normal and tumor states in the learned latent space. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} |Measure | Normal| Tumor| Delta| |:-------------------|------:|------:|------:| |Participation ratio | 1.407| 3.804| 2.397| |Eigenvalue entropy | 0.584| 1.532| 0.948| |Anisotropy | 0.834| 0.406| -0.429| |Radius | 23.443| 28.415| 4.972| |Centroid distance | 26.499| NA| NA| ::: ::: :::
